increased signal on short-T1 inversion recovery (STIR) images
edema in the apical and lateral segments

interrupted subendocardial late gadolinium enhancement predominantly in the anterior and inferolateral segments

decision to perform a skin biopsy

prednisolone increased to 100 mg once daily
